<h1>Source code for phrasplit.splitter</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Text splitting utilities using spaCy for NLP-based sentence and clause detection.</span>

<span class="sd">This module provides two implementations:</span>
<span class="sd">1. spaCy-based (default when available): High accuracy, handles complex cases</span>
<span class="sd">2. Regex-based (fallback): Faster, simpler, good for common cases</span>

<span class="sd">The implementation is selected automatically based on spaCy availability,</span>
<span class="sd">or can be controlled via the use_spacy parameter.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">re</span>
<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">warnings</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">collections.abc</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Iterator</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">typing</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">TYPE_CHECKING</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">NamedTuple</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit.abbreviations</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">get_abbreviations</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">get_sentence_ending_abbreviations</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">get_sentence_starters</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit.types</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">SplitSegment</span>


<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">Segment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">NamedTuple</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A text segment with position information.</span>

<span class="sd">    Attributes:</span>
<span class="sd">        - ``text``: The text content of the segment.</span>
<span class="sd">        - ``paragraph``: Paragraph index (0-based) within the document.</span>
<span class="sd">        - ``sentence``: Sentence index (0-based) within the paragraph.</span>
<span class="sd">          ``None`` for paragraph mode.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">paragraph</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">sentence</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">TYPE_CHECKING</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">spacy.language</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Language</span>  <span class="c1"># type: ignore[import-not-found]</span>

<span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">spacy</span>  <span class="c1"># type: ignore[import-not-found]</span>

    <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
<span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ImportError</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="n">spacy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<span class="c1"># Cache for loaded spaCy model</span>
<span class="n">_nlp_cache</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Language</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>

<span class="c1"># Placeholders for ellipsis during spaCy processing</span>
<span class="c1"># We use Unicode private use area characters to avoid collision with real text</span>
<span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_3_PLACEHOLDER</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\ue000</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>  <span class="c1"># 3 dots: ...</span>
<span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_4_PLACEHOLDER</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\ue001</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>  <span class="c1"># 4 dots: ....</span>
<span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_SPACED_PLACEHOLDER</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\ue002</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>  <span class="c1"># Spaced: . . .</span>
<span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_UNICODE_PLACEHOLDER</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\ue003</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>  <span class="c1"># Unicode ellipsis: …</span>
<span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_LONG_PREFIX</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\ue004</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>  <span class="c1"># Placeholder for 5+ dots (repeat per dot)</span>

<span class="c1"># Regex for hyphenated line breaks (e.g., &quot;recom-\nmendation&quot; -&gt; &quot;recommendation&quot;)</span>
<span class="n">_HYPHENATED_LINEBREAK</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;(\w+)-\s*\n\s*(\w+)&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># URL pattern for splitting</span>
<span class="n">_URL_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;(?:https?://[^\s\)\]\}\&gt;</span><span class="se">\&quot;</span><span class="s2">&#39;,]+|www\.[^\s\)\]\}\&gt;</span><span class="se">\&quot;</span><span class="s2">&#39;,]+|&quot;</span>
    <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\b[\w.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}(?:/[^\s\)\]\}\&gt;</span><span class="se">\&quot;</span><span class="s2">&#39;,]*)?)&quot;</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Pattern to detect abbreviation at end of sentence</span>
<span class="n">_LETTER_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;[^\W\d_]&quot;</span>
<span class="n">_ABBREV_END_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="sa">rf</span><span class="s2">&quot;(\b</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_LETTER_PATTERN</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">+(?:\.</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_LETTER_PATTERN</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">+)*)\.\s*$&quot;</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="n">_URL_TRAILING_PUNCT</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.,)]}&gt;</span><span class="se">\&quot;</span><span class="s2">&#39;&quot;</span>
<span class="n">_OPENING_PUNCTUATION</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\&quot;</span><span class="s2">&#39;([{«„“”‘’&quot;</span>
<span class="n">_CLOSING_PUNCTUATION</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\&quot;</span><span class="s2">&#39;)]}»”’&quot;</span>

<span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;(?:\.{3,}|(?:\.\s){2,}\.|…)&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Inline markup (XHTML) tag patterns for the opt-in inline_markup split mode.</span>
<span class="c1"># Conservative: an ordinary &#39;&lt;&#39; comparison (e.g. &quot;a &lt; b&quot;) does not match because</span>
<span class="c1"># an opening tag must start with a letter, and a closing tag must start with &#39;&lt;/&#39;.</span>
<span class="n">_OPEN_TAG_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;[A-Za-z][^&gt;]*&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_CLOSE_TAG_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;/[A-Za-z][^&gt;]*&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Default maximum chunk size for spaCy processing (will be capped by nlp.max_length)</span>
<span class="n">_DEFAULT_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">500000</span>

<span class="c1"># Safety margin at chunk boundaries to avoid cutting sentences</span>
<span class="n">_DEFAULT_SAFETY_MARGIN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">100</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_fix_hyphenated_linebreaks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Fix hyphenated line breaks commonly found in PDFs and OCR text.</span>

<span class="sd">    Joins words that were split across lines with a hyphen.</span>
<span class="sd">    Example: &quot;recom-\\nmendation&quot; -&gt; &quot;recommendation&quot;</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        Text with hyphenated line breaks fixed</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_HYPHENATED_LINEBREAK</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\1\2&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_normalize_whitespace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Normalize multiple whitespace characters to single spaces.</span>

<span class="sd">    Preserves paragraph breaks (double newlines) but normalizes</span>
<span class="sd">    other whitespace sequences.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        Text with normalized whitespace</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># First preserve paragraph breaks by using a placeholder</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\n\s*\n&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Normalize other whitespace (but not newlines in paragraph breaks)</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;[^\S\n]+&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_preprocess_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Apply preprocessing steps to clean up text before NLP processing.</span>

<span class="sd">    Steps:</span>
<span class="sd">    1. Fix hyphenated line breaks (common in PDFs)</span>
<span class="sd">    2. Normalize whitespace</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        Preprocessed text</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_fix_hyphenated_linebreaks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_normalize_whitespace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_protect_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Replace ellipsis patterns with placeholders to prevent sentence splitting.</span>

<span class="sd">    Handles:</span>
<span class="sd">    - Spaced ellipsis: &quot;. . .&quot; (dot-space-dot-space-dot)</span>
<span class="sd">    - Regular ellipsis: &quot;...&quot; (three consecutive dots)</span>
<span class="sd">    - Four dots: &quot;....&quot; (often used for ellipsis + period)</span>
<span class="sd">    - Five or more dots: &quot;.....&quot; etc.</span>
<span class="sd">    - Unicode ellipsis: U+2026 (single ellipsis character)</span>

<span class="sd">    Each pattern is replaced with a unique placeholder that preserves information</span>
<span class="sd">    about the original format, allowing exact restoration later. Placeholders</span>
<span class="sd">    preserve length to keep offsets aligned with the original input.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="c1"># Replace spaced ellipsis first (. . .) - must come before regular dots</span>
    <span class="n">spaced_placeholder</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_SPACED_PLACEHOLDER</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> &quot;</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_SPACED_PLACEHOLDER</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> &quot;</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_SPACED_PLACEHOLDER</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;. . .&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">spaced_placeholder</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Replace unicode ellipsis</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u2026</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_UNICODE_PLACEHOLDER</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Replace longer dot sequences first (5+ dots), preserving length</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">replace_long_dots</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">Match</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">count</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_LONG_PREFIX</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">count</span>

    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\.{5,}&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">replace_long_dots</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Replace 4 dots</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;....&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_4_PLACEHOLDER</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Replace 3 dots (must come after 4+ to avoid partial matches)</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_3_PLACEHOLDER</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_restore_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Restore ellipsis placeholders back to their original format.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Restore in reverse order of protection</span>

    <span class="c1"># Restore 3 dots</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_3_PLACEHOLDER</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Restore 4 dots</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_4_PLACEHOLDER</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;....&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Restore long dot sequences (5+)</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">restore_long_dots</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">Match</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="n">long_pattern</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_LONG_PREFIX</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;{5,}&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">long_pattern</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">restore_long_dots</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Restore unicode ellipsis</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_UNICODE_PLACEHOLDER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u2026</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Restore spaced ellipsis</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_SPACED_PLACEHOLDER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_first_cased_char</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">char</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">char</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isalpha</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">char</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_extract_leading_word</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">stripped</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lstrip</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lstrip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_OPENING_PUNCTUATION</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">stripped</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">first_word</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">stripped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">()[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">first_word</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_CLOSING_PUNCTUATION</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_skip_opening_tags</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the index after a run of opening/empty tags starting at ``pos``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">match</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_OPEN_TAG_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">pos</span>
        <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">()</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_skip_closing_tags</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the index after a run of closing tags starting at ``pos``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">match</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_CLOSE_TAG_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">pos</span>
        <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">()</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_is_sentence_start</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">allow_lowercase</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">start</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_OPENING_PUNCTUATION</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">char</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">char</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isalpha</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">char</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isupper</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">allow_lowercase</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">char</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">islower</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">char</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isdigit</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">char</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">char</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_OPENING_PUNCTUATION</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">char</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_CLOSING_PUNCTUATION</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">break</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_find_ellipsis_split_positions</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">allow_lowercase</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">positions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">finditer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">boundary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">boundary</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">boundary</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_CLOSING_PUNCTUATION</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">boundary</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_is_sentence_start</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">boundary</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">allow_lowercase</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">allow_lowercase</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">positions</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">boundary</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">positions</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_trim_url_bounds</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_URL_TRAILING_PUNCT</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_find_url_spans</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
    <span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_URL_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">finditer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_trim_url_bounds</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">())</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">spans</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">spans</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_urls</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split sentences that contain multiple URLs.</span>

<span class="sd">    URLs are often listed one per line in source text, but spaCy may merge them.</span>
<span class="sd">    This function splits sentences only when there are 2+ URLs present.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        sentences: List of sentences from spaCy</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of sentences with multiple URLs properly separated</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">url_spans</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_find_url_spans</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url_spans</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># Split at URL boundaries - each URL becomes its own &quot;sentence&quot;</span>
        <span class="c1"># along with any text that follows it until the next URL</span>
        <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url_spans</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="c1"># Text before this URL (only for first URL)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">url_start</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">prefix</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">[:</span><span class="n">url_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">prefix</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Include prefix with first URL</span>
                    <span class="n">next_url_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">url_spans</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url_spans</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">part</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">[:</span><span class="n">next_url_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
                    <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">part</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">next_url_start</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="c1"># For subsequent URLs or if no prefix</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">url_start</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="n">last_end</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">next_url_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">url_spans</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url_spans</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">part</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">url_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">next_url_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">part</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">part</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">next_url_start</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_find_url_sentence_split_positions</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">positions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">_</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">url_end</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_find_url_spans</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">boundary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">url_end</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">boundary</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">boundary</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_CLOSING_PUNCTUATION</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">boundary</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">boundary</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">boundary</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.!?&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">boundary</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_is_sentence_start</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">boundary</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">positions</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">boundary</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">positions</span><span class="p">))</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_after_url_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Split sentences after URL boundaries when spaCy misses them.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">split_positions</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_find_url_sentence_split_positions</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">split_positions</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">split_pos</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">split_positions</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">part</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">split_pos</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">part</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">part</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_pos</span>

        <span class="n">remaining</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">remaining</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">remaining</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_merge_abbreviation_splits</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Merge sentences that were incorrectly split after abbreviations.</span>

<span class="sd">    spaCy sometimes splits after abbreviations like &quot;M.D.&quot; or &quot;U.S.&quot; when</span>
<span class="sd">    followed by a name or continuation. This function merges such cases.</span>

<span class="sd">    Conservative approach: only merge if:</span>
<span class="sd">    1. Previous sentence ends with a known abbreviation + period</span>
<span class="sd">    2. The abbreviation is NOT one that commonly ends sentences (etc., Inc., etc.)</span>
<span class="sd">    3. Next sentence starts with a capital letter (likely a name/continuation)</span>
<span class="sd">    4. Next sentence does NOT start with a common sentence starter</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        sentences: List of sentences from spaCy</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: spaCy language model name (for language-specific abbreviations)</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of sentences with abbreviation splits merged</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Get language-specific abbreviations</span>
    <span class="n">abbreviations</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_abbreviations</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># If no abbreviations for this language, return unchanged</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">abbreviations</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sentences</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sentences</span>

    <span class="c1"># Get common sentence starters and sentence-ending abbreviations</span>
    <span class="n">sentence_starters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_sentence_starters</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">sentence_ending_abbrevs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_sentence_ending_abbreviations</span><span class="p">()</span>

    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">current</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="c1"># Check if we should merge with the next sentence</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">next_sent</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span>

            <span class="c1"># Check if current sentence ends with an abbreviation</span>
            <span class="n">match</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_ABBREV_END_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">search</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">abbrev</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">abbrev</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">is_dotted</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">abbrev</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentence_ending_abbrevs</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">abbreviations</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">is_dotted</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">first_word</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_extract_leading_word</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">next_sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">first_word</span><span class="p">:</span>
                            <span class="n">first_cased</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_first_cased_char</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">first_word</span><span class="p">)</span>
                            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                                <span class="n">first_cased</span>
                                <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">first_cased</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isupper</span><span class="p">()</span>
                                <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">first_word</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentence_starters</span>
                                <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">first_word</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isupper</span><span class="p">()</span>
                            <span class="p">):</span>
                                <span class="n">merged</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">current</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">next_sent</span>
                                <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">merged</span><span class="p">)</span>
                                <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">2</span>
                                <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="c1"># Pattern to detect ellipsis followed by a new sentence.</span>
<span class="c1"># Allows closing quotes/brackets immediately after the ellipsis, e.g. &quot;...&#39; Next&quot;</span>
<span class="c1"># so that &quot;&#39;Hello...&#39; &#39;Is it working?&#39;&quot; can be split after the ellipsis.</span>
<span class="n">_ELLIPSIS_SENTENCE_BREAK</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s1">&#39;((?:\.{3,}|\. \. \.|…)(?:[&quot;</span><span class="se">\&#39;</span><span class="s1">\)\]\}\u201d\u2019]+)?)\s+&#39;</span>
    <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s1">&#39;([&quot;</span><span class="se">\&#39;</span><span class="s1">\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019]*[A-Z])&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_after_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split sentences that contain ellipsis followed by a new sentence.</span>

<span class="sd">    When text like &quot;He was tired.... The next day&quot; is processed, spaCy may not</span>
<span class="sd">    recognize the sentence boundary after the ellipsis. This function splits</span>
<span class="sd">    such cases by detecting ellipsis (3+ dots or &quot;. . .&quot;) followed by whitespace</span>
<span class="sd">    and a capital letter (optionally preceded by quotes).</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        sentences: List of sentences from spaCy</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of sentences with ellipsis boundaries properly handled</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sentences</span>

    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">split_positions</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_find_ellipsis_split_positions</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">split_positions</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">split_pos</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">split_positions</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">first_part</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">split_pos</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">first_part</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">first_part</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_pos</span>

        <span class="n">remaining</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">remaining</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">remaining</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_apply_corrections</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">split_on_colon</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Language</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Apply post-processing corrections to fix common spaCy segmentation errors.</span>

<span class="sd">    Corrections applied (in order):</span>
<span class="sd">    1. Merge sentences incorrectly split after abbreviations (reduces count)</span>
<span class="sd">    2. Split sentences after ellipsis followed by capital letter (increases count)</span>
<span class="sd">    3. Split sentences after URL boundaries missed by spaCy (increases count)</span>
<span class="sd">    4. Split sentences containing multiple URLs (increases count)</span>

<span class="sd">    Note: Colon handling is minimal - we let spaCy handle colons naturally.</span>
<span class="sd">    The split_on_colon parameter is kept for API compatibility but currently</span>
<span class="sd">    has no effect (spaCy&#39;s default colon behavior is used).</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        sentences: List of sentences from spaCy</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: spaCy language model name (for language-specific corrections)</span>
<span class="sd">        split_on_colon: Kept for API compatibility (currently unused)</span>
<span class="sd">        nlp: Optional spaCy language model (currently unused)</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        Corrected list of sentences</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># First merge abbreviation splits (need to combine before other splits)</span>
    <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_merge_abbreviation_splits</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Split after ellipsis followed by new sentence</span>
    <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_after_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Split after URL boundaries missed by spaCy</span>
    <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_after_url_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Split URLs (increases sentence count)</span>
    <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_urls</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sentences</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_get_nlp</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Language</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Get or load a spaCy model (cached).</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: Name of the spaCy language model to load</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        Loaded spaCy Language model</span>

<span class="sd">    Raises:</span>
<span class="sd">        ImportError: If spaCy is not installed</span>
<span class="sd">        OSError: If the specified language model is not found</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ImportError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;spaCy is required for this feature. &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Install with: pip install phrasplit[nlp]</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Then download a language model: python -m spacy download en_core_web_sm&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">language_model</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_nlp_cache</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># spacy is guaranteed to be not None here due to SPACY_AVAILABLE check above</span>
            <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">spacy</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="n">_nlp_cache</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">spacy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">load</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">OSError</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">OSError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;spaCy language model &#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39; not found. &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Download with: python -m spacy download </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_nlp_cache</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_extract_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Extract sentences from a spaCy Doc object.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        doc: A spaCy Doc object</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of sentence strings (stripped, non-empty)</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">doc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sents</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_process_long_text</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Language</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_chunk</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_DEFAULT_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">safety_margin</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_DEFAULT_SAFETY_MARGIN</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Process text that may exceed spaCy&#39;s max_length incrementally.</span>

<span class="sd">    Uses index-based tracking to extract sentences from long text without</span>
<span class="sd">    cutting sentences at chunk boundaries.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text (should be preprocessed, ellipsis protected)</span>
<span class="sd">        nlp: spaCy Language model</span>
<span class="sd">        max_chunk: Maximum characters to process at once</span>
<span class="sd">        safety_margin: Buffer at chunk end to avoid cutting sentences</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of sentence strings (stripped, non-empty)</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Cap max_chunk to spaCy&#39;s limit minus safety margin</span>
    <span class="n">effective_max</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">max_chunk</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">max_length</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">safety_margin</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">effective_max</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">doc</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_extract_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">end_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">effective_max</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start_idx</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end_idx</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">doc</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">end_idx</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="c1"># Last chunk - take all sentences</span>
            <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_extract_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="k">break</span>

        <span class="c1"># Not the last chunk - keep only complete sentences</span>
        <span class="n">last_complete_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">doc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sents</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">sent_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent_text</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end_char</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">safety_margin</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">last_complete_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end_char</span>

        <span class="c1"># Move start index forward</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">last_complete_end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">last_complete_end</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># No sentence boundary found - take all and move on</span>
            <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_extract_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">end_idx</span>

        <span class="c1"># Skip leading whitespace for next iteration</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start_idx</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="se">\t\n\r</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sentences</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_process_long_text_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Language</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_chunk</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_DEFAULT_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">safety_margin</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_DEFAULT_SAFETY_MARGIN</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Process text into sentence offsets without exceeding spaCy limits.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">effective_max</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">max_chunk</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">max_length</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">safety_margin</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">effective_max</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">doc</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">start_char</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end_char</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">doc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sents</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>

    <span class="n">offsets</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
