    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">end_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">effective_max</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start_idx</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end_idx</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">doc</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">end_idx</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">offsets</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">start_char</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end_char</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">doc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sents</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">break</span>

        <span class="n">last_complete_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">doc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sents</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end_char</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">safety_margin</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">offsets</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">start_char</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end_char</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">last_complete_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end_char</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">last_complete_end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">last_complete_end</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">offsets</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">start_char</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end_char</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">doc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sents</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">end_idx</span>

        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start_idx</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="se">\t\n\r</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start_idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">offsets</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="split_paragraphs">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.formatters.split_paragraphs">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">split_paragraphs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split text into paragraphs (separated by double newlines).</span>

<span class="sd">    Applies preprocessing to fix hyphenated line breaks and normalize whitespace.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of paragraphs (non-empty, stripped)</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_preprocess_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">paragraphs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\n\s*\n&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">p</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">paragraphs</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()]</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_sentences_spacy</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">split_on_colon</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split text into sentences using spaCy (internal implementation).</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: spaCy language model to use</span>
<span class="sd">        apply_corrections: Whether to apply post-processing corrections for</span>
<span class="sd">            common spaCy errors (URL splitting, abbreviation handling).</span>
<span class="sd">            Default is True.</span>
<span class="sd">        split_on_colon: Kept for API compatibility (currently unused).</span>
<span class="sd">            spaCy&#39;s default colon behavior is used. Default is True.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of sentences</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">nlp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_get_nlp</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">paragraphs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_paragraphs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">para</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Protect ellipsis from being treated as sentence boundaries</span>
        <span class="n">para</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_protect_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Process paragraph into sentences (handles long text)</span>
        <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_process_long_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Restore ellipsis in the sentence</span>
            <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_restore_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Apply post-processing corrections if enabled</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_apply_corrections</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">split_on_colon</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">split_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">split_on_colon</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split text into sentences.</span>

<span class="sd">    By default, uses spaCy if available for best accuracy, otherwise falls back</span>
<span class="sd">    to regex-based splitting. You can force a specific implementation with use_spacy.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: Language model name (e.g., &quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;, &quot;de_core_news_sm&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">            For spaCy mode: Name of the spaCy model to use</span>
<span class="sd">            For simple mode: Used to determine language for abbreviation handling</span>
<span class="sd">        apply_corrections: Whether to apply post-processing corrections for</span>
<span class="sd">            common spaCy errors (URL splitting, abbreviation handling).</span>
<span class="sd">            Default is True. Only applies to spaCy mode.</span>
<span class="sd">        split_on_colon: Deprecated. Kept for API compatibility (currently unused).</span>
<span class="sd">            spaCy&#39;s default colon behavior is used. Default is True.</span>
<span class="sd">        use_spacy: Choose implementation:</span>
<span class="sd">            ``None`` (default) auto-detects spaCy and uses it if available.</span>
<span class="sd">            ``True`` forces spaCy and raises ImportError if not installed.</span>
<span class="sd">            ``False`` forces simple regex-based splitting without spaCy.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of sentences</span>

<span class="sd">    Raises:</span>
<span class="sd">        ImportError: If use_spacy=True but spaCy is not installed</span>

<span class="sd">    Example::</span>

<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; # Auto-detect (uses spaCy if available)</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; sentences = split_sentences(text)</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt;</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; # Force simple mode (even if spaCy is installed)</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; sentences = split_sentences(text, use_spacy=False)</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt;</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; # Force spaCy mode (error if not installed)</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; sentences = split_sentences(text, use_spacy=True)</span>

<span class="sd">    Note:</span>
<span class="sd">        The simple mode (regex-based) is faster and has no ML dependencies,</span>
<span class="sd">        but is less accurate (~85-90% vs ~95%+ for spaCy) on complex text.</span>
<span class="sd">        For best results with complex text, install spaCy::</span>

<span class="sd">            pip install phrasplit[nlp]</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Deprecation warning for split_on_colon</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">split_on_colon</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">warnings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warn</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;The split_on_colon parameter is deprecated and has no effect. &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;It will be removed in a future version.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="ne">DeprecationWarning</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">stacklevel</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Determine which implementation to use</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Auto-detect: use spaCy if available</span>
        <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># User explicitly requested spaCy but it&#39;s not available</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ImportError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;spaCy is not installed. Install with: pip install phrasplit[nlp]</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Then download a language model: python -m spacy download en_core_web_sm</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Or use use_spacy=False to use the simple regex-based splitter.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Use spaCy-based implementation</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_split_sentences_spacy</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">split_on_colon</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Use simple regex-based implementation</span>
        <span class="c1"># Import here to avoid circular dependency issues</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit.splitter_without_spacy</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_sentences_simple</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">split_sentences_simple</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_sentence_into_clauses</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentence</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split a sentence into comma-separated parts for audiobook creation.</span>

<span class="sd">    Splits only at commas, keeping the comma at the end of each part.</span>
<span class="sd">    This creates natural pause points for text-to-speech processing.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        sentence: A single sentence</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of comma-separated parts</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Pattern to split after comma followed by space</span>
    <span class="c1"># Using positive lookbehind to keep comma at end of clause</span>
    <span class="n">parts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;(?&lt;=,)\s+&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sentence</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Filter empty parts and strip whitespace</span>
    <span class="n">clauses</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">p</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">parts</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()]</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">clauses</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">clauses</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sentence</span><span class="p">]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_clauses_spacy</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split text into comma-separated parts using spaCy (internal implementation).</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: spaCy language model to use</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of comma-separated parts</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">nlp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_get_nlp</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">paragraphs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_paragraphs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">para</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Protect ellipsis from being treated as sentence boundaries</span>
        <span class="n">para</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_protect_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Process paragraph into sentences (handles long text)</span>
        <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_process_long_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Process each sentence into clauses</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Restore ellipsis in the sentence</span>
            <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_restore_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Split sentence at clause boundaries</span>
            <span class="n">clauses</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_sentence_into_clauses</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">clauses</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">split_clauses</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split text into comma-separated parts for audiobook creation.</span>

<span class="sd">    Uses sentence detection, then splits each sentence at commas.</span>
<span class="sd">    The comma stays at the end of each part, creating natural pause points</span>
<span class="sd">    for text-to-speech processing.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: Language model name (e.g., &quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        use_spacy: Choose implementation:</span>
<span class="sd">            ``None`` (default) auto-detects spaCy and uses it if available.</span>
<span class="sd">            ``True`` forces spaCy and raises ImportError if not installed.</span>
<span class="sd">            ``False`` forces simple regex-based splitting.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of comma-separated parts</span>

<span class="sd">    Raises:</span>
<span class="sd">        ImportError: If use_spacy=True but spaCy is not installed</span>

<span class="sd">    Example::</span>

<span class="sd">        Input: &quot;I do like coffee, and I like wine.&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Output: [&quot;I do like coffee,&quot;, &quot;and I like wine.&quot;]</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Determine which implementation to use</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ImportError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;spaCy is not installed. Install with: pip install phrasplit[nlp]</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Or use use_spacy=False to use the simple regex-based splitter.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_split_clauses_spacy</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit.splitter_without_spacy</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_clauses_simple</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">split_clauses_simple</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_at_clauses</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split text at comma boundaries for audiobook creation.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Text to split</span>
<span class="sd">        max_length: Maximum line length</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of lines</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Split at commas, keeping the comma with the preceding text</span>
    <span class="n">parts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;(?&lt;=,)\s+&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">part</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">part</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">part</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">part</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">part</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">part</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">part</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">part</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># If still too long, do hard split at word boundaries</span>
    <span class="n">final_result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">line</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">final_result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_hard_split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">final_result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">final_result</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">final_result</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_hard_split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Hard split text at word boundaries when clause splitting isn&#39;t enough.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Text to split</span>
<span class="sd">        max_length: Maximum line length</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of lines</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">words</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">word</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">words</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">word</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">word</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">word</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">word</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">result</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_at_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Language</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split text at sentence/clause boundaries to fit within max_length.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Text to split</span>
<span class="sd">        max_length: Maximum line length</span>
<span class="sd">        nlp: spaCy language model</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of lines</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Protect ellipsis before spaCy processing</span>
    <span class="n">protected_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_protect_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Split into sentences (handles long text)</span>
    <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_process_long_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">protected_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Restore ellipsis in the sentence</span>
        <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_restore_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="c1"># If sentence itself exceeds max_length, split at clauses</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Flush current line first</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
            <span class="c1"># Split sentence at clause boundaries</span>
            <span class="n">clause_lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_at_clauses</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">clause_lines</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sent</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">result</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_long_lines_spacy</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split lines exceeding max_length at clause/sentence boundaries using spaCy.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text</span>
<span class="sd">        max_length: Maximum line length in characters (must be positive)</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: spaCy language model to use</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of lines, each within max_length (except single words exceeding limit)</span>

<span class="sd">    Raises:</span>
<span class="sd">        ValueError: If max_length is less than 1</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">max_length</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;max_length must be at least 1, got </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">max_length</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">nlp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_get_nlp</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">line</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Check if line is within limit</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># Split the long line</span>
        <span class="n">split_lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_at_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">split_lines</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">split_long_lines</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split lines exceeding max_length at clause/sentence boundaries.</span>

<span class="sd">    Strategy:</span>
<span class="sd">    1. First try to split at sentence boundaries</span>
<span class="sd">    2. If still too long, split at clause boundaries (commas, semicolons, etc.)</span>
<span class="sd">    3. If still too long, split at word boundaries</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text</span>
<span class="sd">        max_length: Maximum line length in characters (must be positive)</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: Language model name (e.g., &quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        use_spacy: Choose implementation:</span>
<span class="sd">            ``None`` (default) auto-detects spaCy and uses it if available.</span>
<span class="sd">            ``True`` forces spaCy and raises ImportError if not installed.</span>
<span class="sd">            ``False`` forces simple regex-based splitting.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of lines, each within max_length (except single words exceeding limit)</span>

<span class="sd">    Raises:</span>
<span class="sd">        ValueError: If max_length is less than 1</span>
<span class="sd">        ImportError: If use_spacy=True but spaCy is not installed</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Determine which implementation to use</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ImportError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;spaCy is not installed. Install with: pip install phrasplit[nlp]</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Or use use_spacy=False to use the simple regex-based splitter.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_split_long_lines_spacy</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit.splitter_without_spacy</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_long_lines_simple</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">split_long_lines_simple</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">split_text</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">split_on_colon</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Segment</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split text into segments with hierarchical position information.</span>

<span class="sd">    This function provides a unified interface for text splitting with different</span>
<span class="sd">    granularity levels, while preserving paragraph and sentence structure information.</span>
<span class="sd">    Useful for audiobook generation where different pause lengths are needed</span>
<span class="sd">    between paragraphs vs. sentences vs. clauses.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text to split</span>
<span class="sd">        mode: Splitting mode. Valid values are ``&quot;paragraph&quot;``, ``&quot;sentence&quot;``,</span>
<span class="sd">            and ``&quot;clause&quot;``.</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: Language model name (e.g., &quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        apply_corrections: Whether to apply post-processing corrections for</span>
<span class="sd">            common spaCy errors (URL splitting, abbreviation handling).</span>
<span class="sd">            Default is True. Only applies to spaCy mode and sentence/clause modes.</span>
<span class="sd">        split_on_colon: Deprecated. Kept for API compatibility (currently unused).</span>
<span class="sd">            spaCy&#39;s default colon behavior is used. Default is True.</span>
<span class="sd">        use_spacy: Choose implementation:</span>
<span class="sd">            ``None`` (default) auto-detects spaCy and uses it if available.</span>
<span class="sd">            ``True`` forces spaCy and raises ImportError if not installed.</span>
<span class="sd">            ``False`` forces simple regex-based splitting.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of Segment namedtuples, each containing:</span>
<span class="sd">            - text: The segment text</span>
<span class="sd">            - paragraph: Paragraph index (0-based)</span>
<span class="sd">            - sentence: Sentence index within paragraph (0-based).</span>
<span class="sd">              None for paragraph mode.</span>

<span class="sd">    Raises:</span>
<span class="sd">        ValueError: If mode is not one of &quot;paragraph&quot;, &quot;sentence&quot;, &quot;clause&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        ImportError: If use_spacy=True but spaCy is not installed</span>

<span class="sd">    Example::</span>

<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; segments = split_text(&quot;Hello world. How are you?\\n\\nNew paragraph.&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; for seg in segments:</span>
<span class="sd">        ...     print(f&quot;P{seg.paragraph} S{seg.sentence}: {seg.text}&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        P0 S0: Hello world.</span>
<span class="sd">        P0 S1: How are you?</span>
<span class="sd">        P1 S0: New paragraph.</span>

<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; # Detect paragraph changes for longer pauses</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; for i, seg in enumerate(segments):</span>
<span class="sd">        ...     if i &gt; 0 and seg.paragraph != segments[i-1].paragraph:</span>
<span class="sd">        ...         print(&quot;--- paragraph break ---&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        ...     print(seg.text)</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Deprecation warning</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">split_on_colon</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">warnings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warn</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;The split_on_colon parameter is deprecated and has no effect. &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;It will be removed in a future version.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="ne">DeprecationWarning</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">stacklevel</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">valid_modes</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;clause&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">valid_modes</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;mode must be one of </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">valid_modes</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">, got </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">paragraphs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_paragraphs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Segment</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">para</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Segment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">paragraph</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sentence</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>

    <span class="c1"># Determine which implementation to use for sentence/clause modes</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ImportError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;spaCy is not installed. Install with: pip install phrasplit[nlp]</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Or use use_spacy=False to use the simple regex-based splitter.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Use spaCy implementation</span>
        <span class="n">nlp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_get_nlp</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">para</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="c1"># Protect ellipsis from being treated as sentence boundaries</span>
            <span class="n">protected_para</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_protect_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Process paragraph into sentences (handles long text)</span>
            <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_process_long_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">protected_para</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Restore ellipsis in sentences</span>
            <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_restore_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">]</span>

            <span class="c1"># Apply post-processing corrections if enabled</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_apply_corrections</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">split_on_colon</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nlp</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">Segment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">paragraph</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sentence</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;clause&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="n">clauses</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_sentence_into_clauses</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">clause</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">clauses</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="n">Segment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">clause</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">paragraph</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sentence</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Use simple implementation</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit.splitter_without_spacy</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_sentences_simple</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">para</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="c1"># Get sentences for this paragraph</span>
            <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_sentences_simple</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">Segment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">paragraph</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sentence</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;clause&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="n">clauses</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_sentence_into_clauses</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">clause</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">clauses</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="n">Segment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">clause</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">paragraph</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sentence</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="c1"># =============================================================================</span>
<span class="c1"># Offset-preserving segmentation</span>
<span class="c1"># =============================================================================</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_make_segment_id</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">paragraph_idx</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sentence_idx</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Generate a stable segment ID.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        paragraph_idx: Paragraph index (0-based)</span>
<span class="sd">        sentence_idx: Sentence index (0-based)</span>
<span class="sd">        clause_idx: Clause index (0-based), or None</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        Stable ID string in format &quot;p{para}s{sent}&quot; or &quot;p{para}s{sent}c{clause}&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">clause_idx</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;p</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">paragraph_idx</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">s</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">sentence_idx</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;p</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">paragraph_idx</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">s</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">sentence_idx</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">c</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_offset_segments</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Validate that segments align to the original text offsets.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">text_length</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">text_length</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;Segment offsets out of bounds for &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">-</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;Segment text does not match slice for &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">-</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">last_end</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;Segments overlap or are out of order at &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> &lt; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">last_end</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_trim_segment_bounds</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Trim whitespace from the segment boundaries without altering offsets.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_merge_abbreviation_splits_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]],</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Merge abbreviation splits while preserving exact offsets.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">segments</span>

    <span class="n">abbreviations</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_abbreviations</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">abbreviations</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">segments</span>

    <span class="n">sentence_starters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_sentence_starters</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">sentence_ending_abbrevs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_sentence_ending_abbreviations</span><span class="p">()</span>

    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">current_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">):</span>
