            <span class="n">next_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">next_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">next_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span>

            <span class="n">match</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_ABBREV_END_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">search</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">())</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">abbrev</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">abbrev</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">is_dotted</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">abbrev</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentence_ending_abbrevs</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">abbreviations</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">is_dotted</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">first_word</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_extract_leading_word</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">next_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">first_word</span><span class="p">:</span>
                            <span class="n">first_cased</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_first_cased_char</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">first_word</span><span class="p">)</span>
                            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                                <span class="n">first_cased</span>
                                <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">first_cased</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isupper</span><span class="p">()</span>
                                <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">first_word</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentence_starters</span>
                                <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">first_word</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isupper</span><span class="p">()</span>
                            <span class="p">):</span>
                                <span class="n">merged_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">current_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">next_end</span><span class="p">]</span>
                                <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">merged_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">next_end</span><span class="p">))</span>
                                <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">2</span>
                                <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">current_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current_end</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_after_ellipsis_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Split sentences after ellipsis boundaries while preserving offsets.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">segments</span>

    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">split_positions</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_find_ellipsis_split_positions</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">split_positions</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">trimmed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_trim_segment_bounds</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span>
                <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="n">current_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">split_pos</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">split_positions</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">absolute_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">split_pos</span>
            <span class="n">trimmed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_trim_segment_bounds</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">absolute_end</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span>
                <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="n">current_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">absolute_end</span>

        <span class="n">trimmed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_trim_segment_bounds</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_urls_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Split sentences containing multiple URLs while preserving offsets.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">url_spans</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_find_url_spans</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg_text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url_spans</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">seg_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url_spans</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">url_start</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">prefix</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_text</span><span class="p">[:</span><span class="n">url_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">prefix</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">next_url_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">url_spans</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url_spans</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">part_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span>
                    <span class="n">part_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">next_url_start</span>
                    <span class="n">trimmed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_trim_segment_bounds</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">part_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">part_end</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span>
                        <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">))</span>
                    <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">next_url_start</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">url_start</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="n">last_end</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">next_url_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">url_spans</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url_spans</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">part_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">url_start</span>
                <span class="n">part_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">next_url_start</span>
                <span class="n">trimmed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_trim_segment_bounds</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">part_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">part_end</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span>
                    <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">))</span>
                <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">next_url_start</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_after_url_boundaries_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Split sentences after URL boundaries while preserving offsets.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">split_positions</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_find_url_sentence_split_positions</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">split_positions</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">seg_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="n">current_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">split_pos</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">split_positions</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">absolute_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">split_pos</span>
            <span class="n">trimmed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_trim_segment_bounds</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">absolute_end</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span>
                <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="n">current_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">absolute_end</span>

        <span class="n">trimmed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_trim_segment_bounds</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">trimmed</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_apply_corrections_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]],</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Apply sentence corrections while preserving exact offsets.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_merge_abbreviation_splits_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_after_ellipsis_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_after_url_boundaries_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_urls_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">segments</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_simple_sentence_split_preserving_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: C901</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Split text into sentences using simple regex, preserving exact character offsets.</span>

<span class="sd">    This is a minimal sentence splitter for offset-preserving segmentation.</span>
<span class="sd">    It does NO preprocessing or normalization - works on raw text only.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Raw text to split (no preprocessing!)</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: Language model for abbreviation handling</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of (sentence_text, start_offset, end_offset) tuples</span>
<span class="sd">        where text[start:end] == sentence_text (exact-slice invariant)</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="c1"># Get abbreviations for this language to avoid splitting on &quot;Dr.&quot;, etc.</span>
    <span class="c1"># But DO split on sentence-ending abbreviations like &quot;Inc.&quot;, &quot;Ltd.&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">abbreviations</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_abbreviations</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">sentence_ending_abbrevs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_sentence_ending_abbreviations</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">sentence_starters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_sentence_starters</span><span class="p">()</span>

    <span class="c1"># Split on sentence-ending punctuation followed by a new sentence start</span>
    <span class="n">sentence_pattern</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;[.!?]+&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentence_pattern</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">finditer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">match_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">match_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">match_end</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">match_end</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">_is_sentence_start</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">match_end</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="n">is_abbreviation</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
        <span class="n">token_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match_start</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">token_start</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">token_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">token_start</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">token_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">match_start</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_CLOSING_PUNCTUATION</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">abbrev_token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">abbrev_token</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">dotted_acronym</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">abbrev_token</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">all</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">char</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isalpha</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">char</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">char</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">abbrev_token</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">abbrev_key</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentence_ending_abbrevs</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">is_abbreviation</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
            <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">abbreviations</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">dotted_acronym</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">next_word</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_extract_leading_word</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">match_end</span><span class="p">:])</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">dotted_acronym</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">next_word</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">next_word</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentence_starters</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">is_abbreviation</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
                <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">is_abbreviation</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">is_abbreviation</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">sent_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">last_end</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Find the exact slice in original text</span>
            <span class="c1"># We need to adjust for stripping</span>
            <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">last_end</span>
            <span class="c1"># Skip leading whitespace</span>
            <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="c1"># Adjust end to exclude trailing whitespace</span>
            <span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span>
            <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span>

    <span class="c1"># Add final sentence</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">sent_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">last_end</span><span class="p">:]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Find exact slice</span>
            <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">last_end</span>
            <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="c1"># Fallback: if no sentences found, return the whole text as one sentence</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sentences</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_simple_sentence_split_with_markup_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: C901</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Markup-aware sentence split preserving exact character offsets.</span>

<span class="sd">    Like :func:`_simple_sentence_split_preserving_offsets`, but understands inline</span>
<span class="sd">    XHTML tags so sentence boundaries are not blocked by inline markup:</span>

<span class="sd">    * Closing tags immediately after sentence punctuation belong to the previous</span>
<span class="sd">      segment, keeping fragments balanced (``her.&lt;/em&gt;`` keeps ``&lt;/em&gt;``).</span>
<span class="sd">    * Opening/empty tags after the following whitespace belong to the next</span>
<span class="sd">      segment (``slowly. &lt;em&gt;I`` starts the next segment at ``&lt;em&gt;``).</span>

<span class="sd">    The exact-slice invariant ``text[start:end] == sentence_text`` is preserved.</span>
<span class="sd">    Tags are matched with a conservative regex; ordinary ``&lt;`` comparisons are</span>
<span class="sd">    not treated as tags.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="n">abbreviations</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_abbreviations</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">sentence_ending_abbrevs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_sentence_ending_abbreviations</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">sentence_starters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_sentence_starters</span><span class="p">()</span>

    <span class="n">sentence_pattern</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;[.!?]+&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentence_pattern</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">finditer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">match_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">match_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="c1"># Closing tags after punctuation belong to the previous segment so</span>
        <span class="c1"># fragments stay balanced; the boundary sits after them.</span>
        <span class="n">seg_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_skip_closing_tags</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">match_end</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">seg_end</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># Skip whitespace, then opening/empty tags, to reach the real next start.</span>
        <span class="n">ws_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">ws_end</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ws_end</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">ws_end</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="n">next_visible</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_skip_opening_tags</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ws_end</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">next_visible</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">_is_sentence_start</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">next_visible</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># Abbreviation handling (same token-before logic as the plain splitter).</span>
        <span class="n">is_abbreviation</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
        <span class="n">token_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match_start</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">token_start</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">token_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">token_start</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">token_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">match_start</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_CLOSING_PUNCTUATION</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">abbrev_token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">abbrev_token</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">dotted_acronym</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">abbrev_token</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">all</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">char</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isalpha</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">char</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">char</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">abbrev_token</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">abbrev_key</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentence_ending_abbrevs</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">is_abbreviation</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
            <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">abbrev_key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">abbreviations</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">dotted_acronym</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">next_word</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_extract_leading_word</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">next_visible</span><span class="p">:])</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">dotted_acronym</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">next_word</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">next_word</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentence_starters</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">is_abbreviation</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
                <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">is_abbreviation</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">is_abbreviation</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="n">sent_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">last_end</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">seg_end</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">last_end</span>
            <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span>
            <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_end_adjusted</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_end</span>

    <span class="c1"># Add final sentence</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">sent_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">last_end</span><span class="p">:]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">last_end</span>
            <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="c1"># Fallback: if no sentences found, return the whole text as one sentence</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sentences</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_with_offsets_regex</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">inline_markup</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Split text using regex-based approach with character offsets.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text to split</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: Language model name for abbreviation handling</span>
<span class="sd">        mode: Splitting mode (&quot;paragraph&quot;, &quot;sentence&quot;, or &quot;clause&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        max_chars: Optional maximum segment length</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of SplitSegment objects with character offsets</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;clause&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;mode must be &#39;paragraph&#39;, &#39;sentence&#39;, or &#39;clause&#39;, got </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Import regex-based functions</span>

    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="c1"># Find paragraph boundaries using regex</span>
    <span class="n">para_pattern</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\n\s*\n&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">para_starts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">para_pattern</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">finditer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">para_starts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">())</span>

    <span class="n">para_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">para_start</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para_starts</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">para_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">para_starts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para_starts</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Skip leading whitespace</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">para_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">para_end</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">para_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">para_start</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

        <span class="c1"># Skip trailing whitespace</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">para_end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">para_start</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">para_end</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">para_end</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

        <span class="c1"># Extract exact slice (no .strip() needed since we adjusted offsets)</span>
        <span class="n">para_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">para_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">para_end</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">para_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">seg_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_make_segment_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">seg_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">char_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">char_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">paragraph_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">sentence_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">meta</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;regex&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;mode&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">},</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">para_idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># For sentence and clause modes, use offset-preserving sentence split</span>
        <span class="c1"># This avoids preprocessing that would break the exact-slice invariant</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">inline_markup</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">sentences_with_offsets</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_simple_sentence_split_with_markup_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">para_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">sentences_with_offsets</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_simple_sentence_split_preserving_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">para_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">sent_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_offset_in_para</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_end_in_para</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentences_with_offsets</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Calculate absolute offsets</span>
            <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">para_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sent_offset_in_para</span>
            <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">para_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sent_end_in_para</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">seg_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_make_segment_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">seg_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">char_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">char_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">paragraph_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">sentence_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">meta</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;regex&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;mode&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">},</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># clause mode</span>
                <span class="n">clauses</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_sentence_into_clauses</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">clause_search_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">clause_text</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">clauses</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Find clause within sentence</span>
                    <span class="n">clause_offset</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">clause_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">clause_search_start</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">clause_offset</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">clause_offset</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">clause_search_start</span>

                    <span class="n">clause_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">clause_offset</span>
                    <span class="n">clause_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">clause_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">clause_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">clause_search_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">clause_offset</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">clause_text</span><span class="p">)</span>

                    <span class="n">seg_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_make_segment_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">seg_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">clause_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">char_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">clause_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">char_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">clause_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">paragraph_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">sentence_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">meta</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;regex&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;mode&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;clause&quot;</span><span class="p">},</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="n">sent_idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

        <span class="n">para_idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

    <span class="c1"># Apply max_chars splitting if needed</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_apply_max_chars_split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_with_offsets_spacy</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Split text using spaCy-based approach with character offsets.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text to split</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: spaCy language model name</span>
<span class="sd">        mode: Splitting mode (&quot;paragraph&quot;, &quot;sentence&quot;, or &quot;clause&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        max_chars: Optional maximum segment length</span>
<span class="sd">        apply_corrections: Whether to apply post-processing corrections for</span>
<span class="sd">            common spaCy errors (URL splitting, abbreviation handling, ellipsis).</span>
<span class="sd">            Default is True.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of SplitSegment objects with character offsets</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;clause&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;mode must be &#39;paragraph&#39;, &#39;sentence&#39;, or &#39;clause&#39;, got </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">nlp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_get_nlp</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="c1"># Find paragraph boundaries</span>
    <span class="n">para_pattern</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\n\s*\n&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">para_starts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">para_pattern</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">finditer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">para_starts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">())</span>

    <span class="n">para_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
