    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">para_start</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para_starts</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">para_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">para_starts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para_starts</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Skip leading whitespace</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">para_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">para_end</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">para_start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">para_start</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

        <span class="c1"># Skip trailing whitespace</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">para_end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">para_start</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">para_end</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">para_end</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

        <span class="c1"># Extract exact slice (no .strip() needed since we adjusted offsets)</span>
        <span class="n">para_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">para_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">para_end</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">para_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">seg_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_make_segment_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">seg_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">char_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">char_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">paragraph_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">sentence_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">meta</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;spacy&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;mode&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">},</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">para_idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="n">protected_para</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_protect_ellipsis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">sent_offsets</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_process_long_text_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">protected_para</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nlp</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent_start_in_para</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_end_in_para</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sent_offsets</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">sent_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">para_text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">sent_start_in_para</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">sent_end_in_para</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">sent_text</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">para_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sent_start_in_para</span>
            <span class="n">sent_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">para_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sent_end_in_para</span>
            <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">))</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_apply_corrections_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">seg_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_make_segment_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">seg_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">char_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">char_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">paragraph_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">sentence_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">meta</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;spacy&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;mode&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">},</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># clause mode</span>
                <span class="n">clauses</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_sentence_into_clauses</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">clause_search_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">clause_text</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">clauses</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="n">clause_offset</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">clause_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">clause_search_start</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">clause_offset</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">clause_offset</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">clause_search_start</span>

                    <span class="n">clause_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">clause_offset</span>
                    <span class="n">clause_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">clause_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">clause_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">clause_search_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">clause_offset</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">clause_text</span><span class="p">)</span>

                    <span class="n">seg_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_make_segment_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">seg_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">clause_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">char_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">clause_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">char_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">clause_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">paragraph_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">sentence_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sent_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">meta</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;spacy&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;mode&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;clause&quot;</span><span class="p">},</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">para_idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

    <span class="c1"># Apply max_chars splitting if needed</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_apply_max_chars_split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_apply_max_chars_split</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">original_text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Split segments that exceed max_chars while preserving exact offsets.</span>

<span class="sd">    Implements the exact-slice policy:</span>
<span class="sd">        segment.text == original_text[char_start:char_end]</span>

<span class="sd">    Strategy for splitting:</span>
<span class="sd">    1. Try to split at whitespace or punctuation boundaries near max_chars</span>
<span class="sd">    2. Never use .strip() - preserve exact slices</span>
<span class="sd">    3. Offsets always match the exact positions in original text</span>
<span class="sd">    4. Skip whitespace-only chunks by advancing boundaries</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        original_text: The original input text</span>
<span class="sd">        segments: List of segments to potentially split</span>
<span class="sd">        max_chars: Maximum character length for any segment</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        New list of segments with long segments split, maintaining exact-slice invariant</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># Need to split this segment</span>
        <span class="c1"># Strategy: split on whitespace or punctuation, never strip</span>
        <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="n">sub_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="c1"># Skip leading whitespace to avoid whitespace-only chunks</span>
            <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="k">break</span>

            <span class="c1"># Find a good split point within max_chars</span>
            <span class="n">end_pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">))</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">end_pos</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="c1"># Try to find whitespace or punctuation boundary</span>
                <span class="c1"># Look backwards from end_pos</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">range</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">end_pos</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="se">\t\n</span><span class="s2">,;.!?&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">end_pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
                        <span class="k">break</span>

            <span class="c1"># Extract chunk WITHOUT stripping - exact slice</span>
            <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end_pos</span><span class="p">]</span>

            <span class="c1"># Skip if chunk is only whitespace (advance pos and continue)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isspace</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">end_pos</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="c1"># Calculate absolute offsets in original text</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">pos</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">end_pos</span>

            <span class="c1"># Generate stable ID with sub-index</span>
            <span class="c1"># Use :m{index} suffix for max-chars splits (m = &quot;max-chars&quot;)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sub_idx</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">:m0&quot;</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">:m</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">sub_idx</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>

            <span class="n">chunk_seg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">char_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">char_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">paragraph_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">paragraph_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">sentence_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sentence_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">clause_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">meta</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span>
                    <span class="o">**</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">meta</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;split_by_max_chars&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;max_chars_index&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">sub_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">},</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_seg</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">sub_idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">end_pos</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">inline_markup</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Split text into segments with character offsets and stable IDs.</span>

<span class="sd">    This is the main API for offset-preserving segmentation, designed for</span>
<span class="sd">    downstream processing where exact character positions are critical.</span>

<span class="sd">    **Exact-Slice Policy**</span>

<span class="sd">    This function implements the exact-slice policy. For every returned segment,</span>
<span class="sd">    the following invariant ALWAYS holds::</span>

<span class="sd">        segment.text == text[segment.char_start:segment.char_end]</span>

<span class="sd">    This guarantee means:</span>

<span class="sd">    - Offsets map precisely to the original input text</span>
<span class="sd">    - No whitespace normalization or stripping breaks the mapping</span>
<span class="sd">    - Downstream code can reliably use offsets for span slicing</span>
<span class="sd">    - Integration with token alignment and markup slicing is safe</span>

<span class="sd">    Key features:</span>

<span class="sd">    - Returns segments with precise character offsets (char_start, char_end)</span>
<span class="sd">    - Generates stable, hierarchical IDs (e.g., &quot;p0s1&quot;, &quot;p0s2c3&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">    - Maintains exact-slice invariant in all modes</span>
<span class="sd">    - Supports both spaCy (accurate) and regex (fast) backends</span>
<span class="sd">    - Optional max_chars safety splitting with deterministic boundaries</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text to split</span>
<span class="sd">        mode: Splitting granularity. Valid values are ``&quot;paragraph&quot;``,</span>
<span class="sd">            ``&quot;sentence&quot;``, and ``&quot;clause&quot;``.</span>
<span class="sd">        use_spacy: Backend selection. ``None`` (default) auto-detects spaCy,</span>
<span class="sd">            ``True`` forces spaCy, and ``False`` forces regex-based splitting.</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: Language model name (e.g., &quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;, &quot;de_core_news_sm&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">            Used for both spaCy model selection and abbreviation handling</span>
<span class="sd">        apply_corrections: Whether to apply post-processing corrections for</span>
<span class="sd">            common spaCy errors (URL splitting, abbreviation handling, ellipsis).</span>
<span class="sd">            Default is True. Only applies to spaCy mode.</span>
<span class="sd">        max_chars: Optional maximum segment length. Segments exceeding this</span>
<span class="sd">            will be split further at whitespace/punctuation boundaries while</span>
<span class="sd">            maintaining the exact-slice invariant. Split segments get IDs</span>
<span class="sd">            like &quot;p0s1:m0&quot;, &quot;p0s1:m1&quot;, etc.</span>
<span class="sd">        inline_markup: Opt-in inline XHTML markup handling (default False). When</span>
<span class="sd">            True, the regex backend keeps inline tags balanced across sentence</span>
<span class="sd">            boundaries: closing tags after punctuation stay in the previous</span>
<span class="sd">            segment and opening tags after whitespace start the next segment.</span>
<span class="sd">            Requires the regex backend; passing ``use_spacy=True`` with</span>
<span class="sd">            ``inline_markup=True`` raises ValueError. Default behavior (plain</span>
<span class="sd">            text) is unchanged when False.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        List of SplitSegment objects, each containing:</span>
<span class="sd">            - id: Stable identifier (e.g., &quot;p0s1c2&quot; or &quot;p0s1:m0&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">            - text: Segment text content (exact slice of input)</span>
<span class="sd">            - char_start, char_end: Character offsets in original text</span>
<span class="sd">            - paragraph_idx, sentence_idx, clause_idx: Hierarchical indices</span>
<span class="sd">            - meta: Additional metadata (method, mode, etc.)</span>

<span class="sd">    Raises:</span>
<span class="sd">        ValueError: If mode is invalid or max_chars &lt; 1</span>
<span class="sd">        ImportError: If use_spacy=True but spaCy is not installed</span>

<span class="sd">    Example::</span>

<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; text = &quot;Hello world. How are you?\\n\\nNew paragraph.&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; segments = split_with_offsets(text, mode=&quot;sentence&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; for seg in segments:</span>
<span class="sd">        ...     # Verify exact-slice invariant</span>
<span class="sd">        ...     assert text[seg.char_start:seg.char_end] == seg.text</span>
<span class="sd">        ...     print(f&quot;{seg.id}: {seg.text!r}&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        p0s0: &#39;Hello world.&#39;</span>
<span class="sd">        p0s1: &#39;How are you?&#39;</span>
<span class="sd">        p1s0: &#39;New paragraph.&#39;</span>

<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; # With max_chars safety splitting</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; long_text = &quot;word &quot; * 100</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; segments = split_with_offsets(long_text, max_chars=50)</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; all(len(seg.text) &lt;= 50 for seg in segments)</span>
<span class="sd">        True</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; # Exact-slice invariant still holds</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; all(long_text[s.char_start:s.char_end] == s.text for s in segments)</span>
<span class="sd">        True</span>

<span class="sd">    Note:</span>
<span class="sd">        - Segments may include leading/trailing whitespace from the original text</span>
<span class="sd">        - IDs are stable and deterministic across runs with same input and settings</span>
<span class="sd">        - For SSMD/markup integration, offsets are in the coordinate space of the</span>
<span class="sd">          input text (before or after escaping, depending on your workflow)</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;max_chars must be at least 1, got </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># inline_markup is only supported by the regex backend. Force it and reject</span>
    <span class="c1"># an explicit spaCy request so callers do not silently get plain-text splits.</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">inline_markup</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;inline_markup=True is only supported with the regex backend &quot;</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;(use_spacy=False).&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>

    <span class="c1"># Determine which implementation to use</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">SPACY_AVAILABLE</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ImportError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;spaCy is not installed. Install with: pip install phrasplit[nlp]</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Then download a language model: python -m spacy download en_core_web_sm</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Or use use_spacy=False to use the simple regex-based splitter.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_with_offsets_spacy</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_split_with_offsets_regex</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">inline_markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">inline_markup</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">_validate_offset_segments</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">segments</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">inline_markup</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Iterator</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Streaming iterator variant of split_with_offsets().</span>

<span class="sd">    Yields segments one by one in document order, enabling memory-efficient</span>
<span class="sd">    processing of large texts and streaming TTS synthesis.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text to split</span>
<span class="sd">        mode: Splitting granularity (&quot;paragraph&quot;, &quot;sentence&quot;, or &quot;clause&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        use_spacy: Backend selection (None=auto, True=spaCy, False=regex)</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: Language model name for NLP/abbreviations</span>
<span class="sd">        apply_corrections: Whether to apply post-processing corrections for</span>
<span class="sd">            common spaCy errors (URL splitting, abbreviation handling, ellipsis).</span>
<span class="sd">            Default is True. Only applies to spaCy mode.</span>
<span class="sd">        max_chars: Optional maximum segment length</span>

<span class="sd">    Yields:</span>
<span class="sd">        SplitSegment objects in document order</span>

<span class="sd">    Example::</span>

<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; text = &quot;First sentence. Second sentence.\\n\\nNew paragraph.&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        &gt;&gt;&gt; for segment in iter_split_with_offsets(text, mode=&quot;sentence&quot;):</span>
<span class="sd">        ...     print(f&quot;{segment.id}: {segment.text}&quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        p0s0: First sentence.</span>
<span class="sd">        p0s1: Second sentence.</span>
<span class="sd">        p1s0: New paragraph.</span>

<span class="sd">    Note:</span>
<span class="sd">        - Segments are yielded in document order</span>
<span class="sd">        - No global state or caching</span>
<span class="sd">        - Same offset guarantees as split_with_offsets()</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># For now, use the non-streaming implementation and yield</span>
    <span class="c1"># In the future, this could be optimized for true streaming</span>
    <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">inline_markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">inline_markup</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">yield from</span> <span class="n">segments</span>
</pre></div>
